Your travel designer

Meet Sarah

I spent 20 years building products in tech — learning how to cut through noise, ask the right questions, and design experiences that actually work. Now I apply all of that to the thing I love most: travel.

I'm a certified luxury travel advisor, a mother of three, and someone who believes that a truly great trip doesn't happen by accident. It's designed. Every hotel I recommend, I've researched obsessively. Every itinerary I craft is one I'd take myself — because I probably already have.

20+Years traveling
40+Destinations
3Kids in tow
100%Personal service
Let's plan your trip
What I offer

How I can help

01
Bespoke itineraries

End-to-end trip design built around your style, pace, and what you actually want — not a template.

02
Hotel & resort curation

Access to preferred rates, room upgrades, and amenities at the world's finest properties.

03
Family travel

Trips that are spectacular for adults and genuinely fun for kids. I do it all the time with my own three.

04
Luxury cruises

From Caribbean sailings to Mediterranean voyages — I'll find the right ship, cabin, and itinerary.

05
Wellness & spa escapes

Retreats designed around rest, renewal, and the kind of deep relaxation that actually sticks.

06
Groups & celebrations

Girls' trips, milestone birthdays, bachelorettes — I coordinate every moving piece so you just show up.

07
Cultural experiences

Cooking classes, private tours, local guides — the moments that make a trip unforgettable.

08
Honeymoons & milestones

Your most important trips deserve extraordinary care. I handle every detail so you can be present.

09
Friends & multi-family

Coordinating travel for a crowd is my specialty — everyone happy, nothing left to chance.

"Cruising done right is one of the great travel pleasures — and I know exactly how to do it right."

— Sarah, cruise specialist

"Luxury isn't about spending more. It's about experiencing more — and never wasting a single day."

Got questions?

Everything you want to know

In most cases, no — my services are completely free to you. I earn a commission from hotels, resorts, cruise lines, and tour operators when I book on your behalf. You pay exactly the same price (or often less, thanks to my preferred partner rates and perks) as you would booking directly. It's one of travel's best kept secrets.

Booking online is easy — but getting it right is hard. I know which hotel room has the best view, which resort is actually worth the price, and which destinations are magical in October versus exhausting. I also have access to perks, upgrades, and amenities that you simply can't get on Expedia or Google. And when something goes sideways — a room that isn't what you expected, a transfer that falls through — you have a real person in your corner fighting for you, not a chatbot.

I handle hotels, resorts, cruises, tours, transfers, excursions, restaurant reservations, and the full itinerary design from start to finish. I focus on the parts of travel where my expertise and relationships make a real difference — the places you stay, the things you do, and the way it all fits together. For flights, I'm happy to point you in the right direction, but I typically recommend clients book those directly so you have maximum flexibility and control if anything changes.

The earlier the better — especially for popular destinations, peak seasons, or complex multi-destination trips. For something like summer in Europe or a holiday cruise, I'd love to hear from you 6–12 months out. That said, I've pulled together incredible last-minute trips too, so don't let timing stop you from reaching out. If I can make it happen, I will.

I specialize in elevated, well-planned travel — which doesn't always mean the most expensive option, but it does mean quality over quantity. My sweet spot is clients who want a thoughtfully designed experience and are willing to invest in doing it well. If you're looking for the cheapest possible option, I'm probably not the right fit — but if you want the best experience for your budget, that's exactly what I do.

This is honestly one of the biggest reasons to work with a travel advisor. If a hotel has an issue, a resort room isn't ready, or an excursion needs to change — you call me, not a customer service line. I have direct relationships with my supplier partners and I'll go to bat for you immediately. You're never on your own.

Just reach out! Fill out the contact form below or book a free 30-minute consultation using the calendar on this page. Tell me where you're dreaming of going — even if it's just a vibe and not a destination yet — and we'll take it from there. There's no obligation and no commitment. Let's just talk travel.
